programme.title: E13 - Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: E14 - Cutting Corners
programme.desc: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money and accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbours: the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

programme.title: E16 - Riding The Storm Out
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: E19 - Waterfilter
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.title: E20 - Shhh!
programme.desc: While relaxing at a monastery with a no-noise policy, Ben can't keep quiet and accidentally awakens a dangerous dragon hidden in a secret chamber below the hallowed halls.

programme.title: E18 - The Elemelons
programme.desc: When Truffles' bad temper causes Mung's fruit creatures to stop making juice, he locks her up with an ultimatum: make friends with them or never get out.

programme.title: E19 - Sniffleball
programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: E20 - Mung On The Rocks
programme.desc: Truffles gives Mung the cold shoulder after he forgets their 450th wedding anniversary. With Mung too sad to cook, Chowder must take action.

programme.title: E13 - Mini Mentors
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: E14 - Too Cool For School
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E21 - Bright Lights, Black Hearts
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers. Before long, Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire.

programme.title: E15 - Nothin'to It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E275 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Husband Killers
programme.desc: If hell hath no fury like a woman scorned, imagine the nightmare that's about to be visited upon the man who has scorned three women. Professional killer Chanel has been happily married for ten years, but she discovers that her husband has been carrying on an affair with Dior, a thief. Before the women can tear each other apart, they learn that he also has a third woman, Hermes. When the avenging duo arrives at a hotel to stop their next rendezvous, they find out that Hermes is ready for war.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E2 - Learning Fun at Home & School!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning fun at home & school! First, Mom & Dad put together a road in their backyard so the kids can learn about road safety while driving their toy cars. Then, it's time for a snack as Baby John learns his ABCs with Mom & Dad as they enjoy a delicious bowl of alphabet cereal! The learning continues at school, where the kids learn their body parts, see what's for lunch & learn how to play nicely with their friends.

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Colour Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: E1 - Northern Territory: Darwin - Vibrant Gateway to the Outback
programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. programme.title: E1 - Northern Territory: Darwin - Vibrant Gateway to the Outback
programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.title: E4 - Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers mid-air problems for one DC-3 while another DC-3 springs a leak on a cross-Canada flight.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: A summary of world sports news of the day, both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E4 - The Camouflage Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E12 - Be Brave Bryan
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: E34 - Go Jet Academy: Stop Those Superweeds
programme.desc: Some fast-growing plants that don't belong on Academy Island are in danger of taking over. Can the Go Jetters stop the superweed from damaging the Academy and Grim HQ?

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E30 - The Colour Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is painting in his favourite colouring book. The Squirrels want to have a go too.

programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.desc: When a magic potion turns Crusher into a chicken, it's up to Blaze and AJ to collect three incredible potion ingredients and change him back into a Monster Machine...Before he's a chicken forever!

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf:2025-2026
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: E3 - Johanna Tordjman (Algeria/Tunisia)
programme.desc: A French artist of Algerian and Tunisian origins, it was the death of her grandmother that triggered her artistic gesture. Johanna Tordjman had to paint in order not to forget. Drawing on photographic archives, she chose to tell, through brushstrokes, the stories of heritage, immigration and the invisible memories of contemporary France.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E2 - 涼山殘疾姑娘談求職困境
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E8 - 守護天使看煙花集體落淚
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E8 - 守護天使看煙花集體落淚
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E6 - 今天 我來的剛剛好
programme.desc: 由張純燁、伊能靜、張繼科、朱正廷、宋雨琦、姜振宇等人組成的「戀愛觀察團」，8位年輕男女於雲南大理「浪漫滿屋」合宿一個月，開啟同一屋簷下的合租模式，並於其中彼此之間出現的信號進行推理愛情。

programme.title: E2 - 涼山殘疾姑娘談求職困境
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E16 - 從被潑冷水到渴望被照亮
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E5 - De Hoop: Place of Hope
programme.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programme.title: E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners
programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E2 - A Prickly Problem
programme.desc: Join vets Emily and Martine in the OR, where Dolly the koala’s spaying surgery takes a scary turn. Aid a run-over echidna with vet Nigel, see rescue officer Chantelle’s slick fix for a snared lizard, and probe a possible birdnapping with vet Karina.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners
programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E4 - Coral Seas
programme.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: Tiktoclock: Happy Hour Na
programme.desc: A game-variety show showcasing talents of Filipinos in singing, dancing and many more.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

Catchy Tune
programme.desc: Motor creates the catchiest tune ever-everyone's hooked, from Jessi to the whole world... except Flippy. As the tune turns into a global obsession of endless humming and dancing, Motor must uncover why Flippy is immune-and if he can help save the world.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Cloth Hanger
programme.desc: Oh no what to do with all these extra cloth hangers? Worry not, we have ideas that will upcycle these to the next level!

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... Ballet Shoes
programme.desc: Henry meets a pair of ballet shoes at a dance rehearsal class, and becomes a ballet dancer.

programme.title: Glitch
programme.desc: A spill in the garage causes a malfunction in Jesse's teleportation abilities. Julia and Ian must beat a game in one sitting.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: Dance Baby Dance
programme.desc: Frank buys a dancing machine for the cafe, but only Jessi enjoys it. Robbie mocks it-until he learns girls like guys who can dance. With Jessi's help, he gives it a try and discovers something unexpected: he doesn't just like dancing... he loves it.

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Book
programme.desc: What a wonderful read! Hmm what can we do next? Oh yes leave that to Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Bhilka Diamond
programme.desc: A valuable diamond has been stolen, and Sprinter is on the case. But all the clues point to himself. How can that be?

programme.title: Shake a Tail Feather
programme.desc: Gabi can't decide which animal impression to do for the annual talent show. Anabella suggests she dance like a ‘Bird of Paradise' and Gabi is intrigued. Why would a bird dance? To find out and get a video of the rarely-seen dance, the team flies to New Guinea.

programme.title: Meatball, The Mail Delivery Cat
programme.desc: Meatball brings the mail to Granny Pina and she rewards him with cat treats and cuddles. Granny finds an envelope not addressed to her, so Meatball decides to take it to the rightful owner to get more cat treats and cuddles...

programme.title: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: The kids endure public humiliation performing the worst play of all time for their classmates and family. While in between performances, the gang gains a new perspective on history and decides to put a new spin on an old story.

programme.title: Shake a Tail Feather
programme.desc: Gabi can't decide which animal impression to do for the annual talent show. Anabella suggests she dance like a ‘Bird of Paradise' and Gabi is intrigued. Why would a bird dance? To find out and get a video of the rarely-seen dance, the team flies to New Guinea.

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: It's party time at the Foxes as Franky, Fab, Flip, Flop, and Flow celebrate 'their team' being on TV. Mommy Owl knits Daddy a woolen tail as he attempts to reinvent himself as a fox. Red tries to politely address Grey's relentless noisy sniffing so that he can watch TV.

programme.title: The Deadly Caterpillar
programme.desc: The carnivorous caterpillar of Hawaii has evolved to eat flies. It has grabbing arms and sharp jaws. It creates a hiding place for itself on a leaf so it can't be seen.

programme.title: Book
programme.desc: What a wonderful read! Hmm what can we do next? Oh yes leave that to Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a Brisbane couple determined to return a vandalised, graffiti-daubed wreck to its rightful place as one of the city's finest mansions, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E23 - Marion Grasby
programme.desc: Food entrepreneur and cook Marion Grasby is in the house with a flavourful chicken ramen. Marion confesses she hasn't eaten oranges since she was five years old, will Alice be able to get her to try them in a citrussy salad?

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: It's a quiet start at the Brisbane Operation Centre. Operator Harrison fears this is the calm before the storm and sure enough, it soon becomes a busy day with a range of medical emergencies that put the team to the test.

programme.title: E1 - Port Arthur Massacre
programme.desc: On an autumn morning at Port Arthur's historic convict settlement, a gunman walked into the Broad Arrow Cafe, killing 35 people. We go deep inside the experience, hear from first hand witnesses to understand what happened.

programme.desc: Its long tradition of metal crafts includes the singing bowl, a striking ritual object that reflects Nepal's rich spiritual heritage.

programme.desc: A new generation of social media activists are putting pressure on Western museums and private art collections to return stolen artefacts to the countries.

programme.title: E8 - End Of Week Wizardry
programme.desc: By the time Friday rolls around, there is often a fridge full of odds and ends you want to use up before getting the big shop done.

programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.desc: In France, the Hotel Martinez in Cannes boasts the largest and most expensive suite in Europe. Occupying prime real estate on the La Croisette promenade, it features two Michelin-starred restaurants.

programme.title: E156 - The Parents/The Founder/The Schooling/The Intelligence/The Potion
programme.desc: After accidentally bumping into each other in the grocery aisle, Nicole and her parents have it out. The kids decide to bring about a reunion, in order to secure that backlog of birthday and holiday presents...

Never Ending Summer
programme.desc: Chan Tai Yuen had planned to migrate to Canada, he found out that his wife was having an affair with a foreigner. Chan had already transferred the ownership of the house and the car to his wife. Suddenly Chan lost everything. Chan met Ng Sam Kwi, Chan had nowhere to go and thus moved into Ng's house. They gradually fell in love with each other. Would Ng change herself for her love?

programme.title: Killer's Romance
programme.desc: After learning that his father was killed by the notorious Chinatown Triad, Nidaine becomes a cold-blooded killer determined to get his revenge. When one of his assassinations is witnessed by Jenny, Nidaine plans on silencing her forever. Instead, Nidaine finds himself falling for her, and they must now run for their lives from both the cops and the Triad assassins!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Discover how classic Tootsie Pops get that chewy reward in the middle; sweet and tangy ketchup contains all of the five taste sensations; a traditional Italian dessert, tiramisu, actually gets its pillowy texture from crunchy biscuits; and why salty pretzels get all twisted.

programme.desc: Guangdong's coastline is the longest in China and is shelter to all manner of extraordinary marine life; Corals, Green Turtles, Bowed fiddler crabs, and the Black-faced spoonbill.
